problem id: 839e7350
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  10110010 -> 01110111
  00011110 -> 01000111
  10001001 -> 11111011
  11110000 -> 00111111
  01001100 -> 01001111
  00110111 -> 11000011
  10101111 -> 10100011
  10110000 -> 00111111
  11000000 -> 11111111

query: 01111001
predicted answer: 00111011
